column2: Supermemory is an AI memory layer and context engineering platform developed by stork.ai Dhravya Shah that enables developers and enterprises to provide AI agents with persistent, scalable, and contextual memory. It handles the ingestion of raw data, transforms it into vector embeddings, and makes them retrievable through semantic search queries. The platform functions as an external brain for AI, addressing the 'digital amnesia' problem in AI applications by allowing agents to retain and leverage information across sessions and interactions. It supports various data sources and is compatible with major Large Language Models (LLMs), offering an API for integration.
